buildCommand: mkdir -p public/assets && cp index.html success.html error.html regulamin.html polityka-prywatnosci.html public/ && cp -R assets/. public/assets/

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://web3forms.com https://js.hcaptcha.com https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://api.web3forms.com https://web3forms.com https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; frame-src https://web3forms.com https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; form-action 'self' https://api.web3forms.com; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
